title: Smoky Sweet Syrian Beet Kebabs
description: A romantic Syrian dish featuring beets, glaze, and a peppery flavor, perfect for a dinner date.

ingredients.name: beets
ingredients.notes: peeled and chopped into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
Thread the beet pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the beets with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and sumac.
Grill the beets for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are tender and slightly charred.
In a small bowl, whisk together the pomegranate molasses, lemon juice, and garlic.
Brush the glaze onto the beets during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional sumac and pomegranate seeds if desired.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
